test_cases.title: User can complete checkout with saved card
preconditions: User has a saved payment card

steps.action: Add an item to the cart
steps.expected: Item appears in cart with correct price

steps.action: Proceed to checkout and select the saved card
steps.expected: Saved card is pre-selected and order total is shown
Order confirmation screen appears with order number

test_cases.title: Checkout is blocked when the card is expired
preconditions: User's only saved card is expired

steps.action: Add an item to the cart and proceed to checkout
steps.expected: Checkout page loads with the expired card listed
Order is not placed and an 'expired card' error is shown

test_cases.title: New user receives a welcome email after signup
preconditions: Email address is not already registered

steps.action: Complete the signup form with a valid email and password
steps.expected: Account is created and the dashboard is shown

steps.action: Check the inbox of the registered email address
steps.expected: A welcome email arrives within 5 minutes

test_cases.title: Login fails with a clear message on wrong password
preconditions: An account exists for the test user

steps.action: Enter the correct email and a wrong password, then submit
steps.expected: Login is rejected with an 'invalid credentials' message
Account is temporarily locked and the user is told to try later

test_cases.title: Password reset link expires after one use
preconditions: An account exists for the test user

steps.action: Request a password reset and open the emailed link
Set a new password, then open the same link again
steps.expected: Link is rejected as already used
